title: astragalus sabulosus
intro: Astragalus sabulosus, also known as the desert milkvetch, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits of Astragalus sabulosus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing immune function. Astragalus sabulosus is often prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is typically combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
